reviews.review_title: Okay on Oculus Go but better on PSVR
reviews.review_description: One of the 1st VR experiences I bought for the PSVR and great for relaxing under a starry sky. I expected it to be even clearer with the higher resolution lenses of the Oculus Go but it has way too much glare. Like looking at the night sky from the city. Maybe an update can make it clearer.
I can see 3 stage animated stars rotations, while the other 3 squares to be in question symbol, how I can to look these others stages? Thanks.

This is a brilliant planetarium app with one glaring omission. It should show the names of the stars in the major constellations. This would take it to another level for those just getting into astronomy or stargazing.

reviews.review_title: Great app but you have to atrain neck
reviews.review_description: The only problem I have with this app or it would hey 5 stars is that in the planetarium mode you have to strain your neck to look up at the constellations, and you must go through, this mode to unlock the viewing locations.
